hero.tagline: Make committee work simple, transparent, and reliable
hero.title: Community management
hero.subtitle: Runner City Housing Management System brings fees, notices, events, payroll, and security into one clear dashboard—so residents stay informed and the committee makes faster, confident decisions.

problemSolution.title: Why a modern community system matters

problem.title: Manual records create confusion and delays
problem.description: When fees, staff payments, maintenance, and events are tracked across paper files or spreadsheets, information gets lost and decisions slow down.
problem.point1: Scattered records make it hard to know who paid what
problem.point2: Reconciling accounts wastes time and frustrates residents
problem.point3: Low transparency leads to doubt and complaints

solution.title: One platform for the entire community
solution.description: RCHMS digitalizes operations end-to-end—fees, notices, events, reports—so the committee saves time and residents always see clear, trusted updates.
solution.point1: Online payments, automated receipts, and a central ledger
solution.point2: Real-time updates and transparent statements for residents
solution.point3: Smart insights for safety and daily operations

features.title: Everything your community needs
features.subtitle: Collect fees, publish notices, track events, and keep residents informed—fast, clear, and fully traceable

onlinePayment.title: Online fee payments & receipts
onlinePayment.description: Secure payments via SSLCommerz, bKash, Nagad and more—with instant digital receipts and ledger updates.

payroll.title: Staff payroll management
payroll.description: Pay Imams, guards, and cleaners on time with automated records and clear summaries.

transparency.title: Transparent financial reports
transparency.description: Residents can see dues, payments, and expense summaries anytime—less confusion, more trust.

events.title: Events & fund drives
events.description: Ramadan, Eid, charity drives—announcements, participation, and contributions in one place.

bloodDonation.title: Community support network
bloodDonation.description: Coordinate blood donation, emergency help, and community services faster and better.

security.title: Smarter security monitoring
security.description: Alerts, monitoring, and reports make safety operations more effective.

demo.title: See the entire community at a glance
demo.subtitle: A clean dashboard shows fees, dues, events, and safety updates so the committee and residents stay aligned.

benefits.title: Clear benefits for every committee
benefits.subtitle: Save time, reduce friction, and build resident trust

transparency.title: Transparency & accountability
transparency.description: Every transaction is visible, so questions are resolved faster.

noHassle.title: Operations without hassle
noHassle.description: Payments, notices, and reports are automated and easy.

smartSecure.title: Stronger safety oversight
smartSecure.description: Monitoring and alerts help spot issues early.

scalable.title: Scales as you grow
scalable.description: Works for small committees and large communities alike.

testimonial1.quote: I pay fees online and get the receipt instantly—no office visits, no confusion.
testimonial1.author: Resident

testimonial2.quote: As treasurer, I get real-time reports and can make decisions quickly in meetings.
testimonial2.author: Committee Member

testimonial3.quote: With safety updates in one place, the whole community feels more secure.
testimonial3.author: Resident

cta.subtitle: Want a demo or a custom setup for your committee? We’ll help you get started.
